reviews.review_description: Why are you still reading this? Go and play it!

TritonVR 2 is pretty much a game-changer in the VR space! It lets you turn any room into a super cool combat zone where you can battle it out with friends. The tech is top-notch, syncing up real-world and game movements perfectly. Plus, you can get creative and customize your own battlegrounds with all sorts of walls, weapons, and gadgets. It's a blast for group hangouts and has been getting rave reviews on platforms like Meta Quest. Definitely a must-try if you're into immersive gaming!
I give it 5 stars because this game has good potential but i couldn't create the maps i was only in training i hope they finish it so i can play it 100%

developer_response.body:
Hey there,
We just released an update which should streamline the user process to make it easier to create maps. Give it a go now!
